message: Inline <svg> has 2 path(s) (max d="" length 44) with no library marker. Copy verbatim from Heroicons, Lucide, Tabler, Bootstrap Icons, Phosphor, or Material Symbols. Annotate with class="lucide-...", data-icon-source="...", or a <!-- source: ... --> comment so provenance is verifiable.
Inline <style> block in <head> is 58 lines. Move the rules to the external stylesheet; large inline blocks duplicate the design system and drift from the shared file.

IntersectionObserver-driven reveal targets element(s) (.reveal) that start at opacity: 0. On slow paint or font-load, the observer callback can fire after the screenshot or user-visible paint, leaving elements stuck invisible. Use a CSS-only animation (e.g. @keyframes with animation-delay stagger) or set initial opacity:1 and have JS opt INTO the hidden state right before the observer fires.
